flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Allen County Community College rose 58% between 2021 and 2024 ($3.1k → $4.9k).

flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment fell 40% at Allen County Community College vs the 2018–2022 baseline (761 vs 1.3k).

flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Allen County Community College rose 38% between 2021 and 2024 ($3.1k → $4.3k).

flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment at Allen County Community College fell 34% between 2021 and 2024 (1.2k → 810).
